---
name: Broken link
about: Report a dead, redirected, or outdated link in the roadmap materials
title: '[Broken link] '
labels: broken-link
assignees: ''

---

**Where is the link?**
File and section (e.g. `English/Books/Junior.md`, section "C++"), or a link to the line on GitHub.

**What is wrong with it?**
- [ ] Dead (404 / site gone)
- [ ] Redirects somewhere unrelated
- [ ] Content moved to a new address
- [ ] Content is outdated / no longer relevant

**Suggested replacement (if known)**
A working URL for the same or equivalent content.
